# switchMetaParameterDefinition

**Instance Property**

The meta parameter that holds the name of the child node to invoke.

## Declaration

```swift
var switchMetaParameterDefinition: PHASEStringMetaParameterDefinition { get }
```

## Discussion

The framework sets the value of this property to the [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASESwitchNodeDefinition/init(switchMetaParameterDefinition:)] argument.

## Managing Child Nodes

- **addSubtree(_:switchValue:)**: Adds a child node with the given switch value.
